title: Luffy Strikes Back
description: Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: usopp, stop! You need to rest!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There is no carpenter on this ship.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Big deal! We don't need them!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'll fix it like I always have!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll NEVER give up this ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Bull shit! I won't allow that!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Calm down!! Stop yelling at each other!!

summary: Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.
